({RAWSTMT :stmt_location 0 :stmt_len 80
  :stmt {SELECT
    :targets ({TARGET :expr {DOT :expr {COLREF :name "c" :loc_start 7 :loc_end 8} :property "id" :loc_start 7 :loc_end 11} :loc_start 7 :loc_end 11} {TARGET :expr {DOT :expr {COLREF :name "c" :loc_start 13 :loc_end 14} :property "value" :loc_start 13 :loc_end 20} :loc_start 13 :loc_end 20} {TARGET :expr {DOT :expr {COLREF :name "c" :loc_start 22 :loc_end 23} :property "order" :loc_start 22 :loc_end 29} :loc_start 22 :loc_end 29} {TARGET :expr {DOT :expr {COLREF :name "c" :loc_start 31 :loc_end 32} :property "type" :loc_start 31 :loc_end 37} :loc_start 31 :loc_end 37} {TARGET :expr {BRACKET :expr {COLREF :name "c" :loc_start 39 :loc_end 40} :index {STRLIT :val "select" :loc_start 41 :loc_end 47} :loc_start 39 :loc_end 50} :loc_start 39 :loc_end 50} {TARGET :expr {BRACKET :expr {COLREF :name "c" :loc_start 52 :loc_end 53} :index {STRLIT :val "from" :loc_start 54 :loc_end 58} :loc_start 52 :loc_end 61} :loc_start 52 :loc_end 61} {TARGET :expr {BRACKET :expr {COLREF :name "c" :loc_start 63 :loc_end 64} :index {STRLIT :val "where" :loc_start 65 :loc_end 70} :loc_start 63 :loc_end 73} :loc_start 63 :loc_end 73})
    :from {CONTAINER :name "c" :loc_start 79 :loc_end 80} :loc_start 0 :loc_end 80}})
